seoTitle: Augustine Heights vs Austinville — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Augustine Heights and Austinville. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Augustine Heights vs Austinville: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Augustine Heights and Austinville.
heading: Augustine Heights vs Austinville — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Augustine Heights, Queensland and Austinville, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Austinville has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Augustine Heights (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Augustine Heights or Austinville safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Augustine Heights has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Austinville scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Augustine Heights scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Austinville scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Augustine Heights or Austinville?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Austinville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
